ksa_text: Implement and maintain security measures to mitigate or remediate identified vulnerabilities and security risks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: Security & Privacy (affinity 0.42) with insufficient REG signals (1). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.4403). AI Lifecycle Manager interprets and applies regulatory requirements; does not build systems, deliver training curricula, or develop business cases.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Lifecycle Manager.
